components.description: Mandatory root element for every mobile page. Provides the top navigation bar (title, leading, actions) and the page body (items). All other content goes inside it. Templates already insert one Scaffold — do NOT insert a second one; use merge to patch it.

actions.description: Right-side action items (save button, search button).

floatAction.description: Single floating action button (crt.FloatingActionButton). Set to null when not needed.

items.description: Page body — array of container/component references.

components.description: CSS-grid layout container. Supports the 'adaptive' property for per-breakpoint column overrides (small/medium/large).

columns.description: CSS grid-template-columns. Single string '1fr 1fr' or array ['1fr','1fr']. Runtime accepts both formats.

adaptive.description: Per-breakpoint column overrides. Keys: 'small' (phone portrait), 'medium' (landscape/tablet portrait), 'large' (tablet landscape). Example: {"small":{"columns":"1fr"},"medium":{"columns":"1fr 1fr"}}.

padding.description: Padding config: { top, right, bottom, left }.

color.description: Background color. Use 'primary' for profile/area highlight.

components.description: Flexbox layout container for linear horizontal or vertical arrangement of items.

padding.description: Padding config: { top, right, bottom, left }.

components.description: Top-level tab strip container. Holds crt.TabContainer items.
Individual tab body inside crt.TabPanel.

caption.description: Tab header caption (resource string or literal).

components.description: Collapsible panel that can expand to show its content.

tools.description: Tool/action components in the panel header.

expanded.description: Whether the panel is expanded by default.

components.description: Static text label for headings, captions, and inline explanatory copy.
Tappable button for triggering actions, navigation, and menus.

menuItems.description: Child crt.MenuItem entries for dropdown/modal menu.

menuTitle.description: Title shown on the menu picker.

components.description: Single floating action button attached to crt.Scaffold.floatAction. Mobile-specific.

menuTitle.description: Title shown on the menu picker.

components.description: Single-line text input field.
Numeric text input.

format.description: Number format config: { decimalPrecision: N }. Use 0 for integers.

components.description: Email-type text input with validation.
URL/web address text input.
Phone number input with call intent support.

Checkbox for Boolean fields. NOTE: In mobile pages use crt.Toggle for Boolean data-type fields — the mobile designer maps Boolean to crt.Toggle by default. Reserve crt.Checkbox for explicit tristate or custom scenarios.
Lookup dropdown selector. Use for lookup and enumeration fields.

items.description: Data property attribute for lookup items.

showValueAsLink.description: Show selected value as a navigable link.

components.description: Date and/or time picker.
Image upload / preview field.
Multi-line rich text editor.
Numeric range slider.
Boolean toggle switch. Mobile-specific — the mobile designer maps Boolean data types to crt.Toggle (not crt.Checkbox). Always prefer crt.Toggle for Boolean fields in mobile pages.

valueChange.description: Request descriptor fired when value changes.

components.description: Barcode/QR code scanner field. Mobile-only — not available in web pages.

scanned.description: Request descriptor fired when a barcode is scanned.

components.description: Scrollable record list. Used in list/section pages.

items.description: Data property attribute for the record collection, typically '$Items'.

itemSelected.description: Request descriptor fired when an item is selected.

components.description: File attachment list.

items.description: Data property attribute for the file collection.

columns.description: Column definitions for the file list.

components.description: Activity/message feed panel.

primaryColumnValue.description: Record ID binding for ESN messages.

entitySchemaName.description: Entity schema name for the feed.

components.description: Card gallery with image thumbnails.

items.description: Data property attribute for the gallery collection.

useSpecificPage.description: Open a specific page on item click.

components.description: Chronological timeline view for records.
Communication options widget (call, email, SMS links).

items.description: Data property attribute for communication options collection.

components.description: Horizontal stage progress bar for pipeline/status tracking.

recordId.description: Record ID binding for DCM runtime.

components.description: KPI / indicator metric widget.

config.description: Full indicator configuration: { title, data: { providing, formatting }, text: { template, metricMacros, fontSizeMode }, layout: { color, border, icon }, theme, hideTitle }.

components.description: Chart/graph widget for data visualization.

config.description: Full chart configuration: { title, theme, color, layout: { showLegend, showDataLabels }, series: [{ data, type, color, label }], seriesOrder, scales }.

components.description: Action toolbar for the folder tree (add/edit/delete folders).

rootSchemaName.description: Root schema name for folder hierarchy.

components.description: Quick filter chip for applying a named data filter.

valueChange.description: Request descriptor fired when filter changes.

components.description: Group of quick filter chips. Mobile-specific grouping component.
Sort control for record lists. Mobile-specific.

valueChange.description: Request descriptor fired when sort changes.
